description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with a smooth, cartoon-like appearance. The figure is depicted lying on its back with arms outstretched and legs slightly apart. It wears a short-sleeved shirt and shorts, both with simple, clean lines and no visible fastenings or accessories. The head is bald and detached, positioned above the neck, and the facial features are minimalistic. The skin is uniformly rendered, and the overall form is rounded and simplified, lacking fine anatomical details. The asset appears to be constructed from a solid, plastic-like material, giving it a toy-like or mannequin quality.
description: A stylized adult human figure with outstretched arms, wearing a short-sleeved shirt and shorts, and featuring a bald, detachable head. The design is smooth, rounded, and cartoon-like.
description_view_0: View from the feet looking toward the head, showing the outstretched arms, separated head, and the full front of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the profile of the body, the separation of the head, and the relaxed position of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: View from the head looking toward the feet, showing the back of the head, the outstretched arms, and the upper body clothing.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the profile and the detached head.
attribute_posture: lying flat on back with arms outstretched
